activity_segments.description: Array of on-duty windows. Gaps between segments are breaks/off-duty. Open segment (end_time null) means driver is currently on duty.

start_time.description: ISO timestamp when driver went on_duty

end_time.description: ISO timestamp when driver went on_break or off_duty. Null = segment still open.

tot.description: Duration of this on-duty segment in minutes. Null until segment is closed.
